textByHash.8650458228e26987758b4afc514eb90817cfb37d: Hello , what can I do for you?
textByHash.d1273eda4e94764a19466f18b832e92540fa3f85: A long time ago, I was a newbie just like you who didn't know what to do and I would be more than happy to pass on my experience.
textByHash.b9043430a66c8c051150d33fb1fcbf2b8dc5f59a: I've created some Adventure Paths which I recommend you to start off with. An Adventure Path is a list of tasks which you can complete in any order.
textByHash.c5e50b457a0b1e06d16fb02f615f83f76c9a85ed: To help you get started on your Adventure Path, I'll also give you a starter kit with some useful items.
textByHash.cf10d7f3856a46b09cd504b184035bce01e2c2f7: Once you've completed an Adventure Path task, come back to me and I'll give you a reward.
textByHash.88e60921d86fb04ee421a64588562ede21ae2c56: Here are all of the starter kits you have left to claim.
textByHash.88a9e56778e5021824c0b8eb9b7c85542503fe48: You seem to have already claimed all of your starter kits.
textByHash.b974b72cb4733ff3ca65044b04f241be7afa0094: I have no rewards to give you at the moment.
textByHash.4d40614ac0222ee99194478fb4840f262dd60043: I have no rewards to give you at the moment. But I do have some members rewards left to give you, visit me on a members world to receive them.
textByHash.a7da6e594c151699f39184ebf42e83da1edfb7a9: You should make sure you have space before asking for rewards.
textByHash.deceb86f5bc71fba7cf33136d92ff8206ac826e9: That is the last of the rewards you have currently earned. But I do have some members rewards left to give you, visit me on a members world to receive them.
textByHash.765856018785641bef0565cb8cf1b87a086b40db: That is the last of your rewards which you have earned.
textByHash.1c7811e1649d51ff06c55bd94c79b65817fe026b: I can't give you any more rewards until you come back with more inventory space.
textByHash.24e9fa8e4af2bf570097dc12b3b56e1c09a36223: You are currently not participating in Adventure Paths. Would you like to join back in?
textByHash.d8623665e84b64edd9bf0a1ca4ea4035c568d007: I am simply an adventurer like yourself taking a break on my journey.
textByHash.d2fe28383e5912a535297f95123bd21da4f73668: You look new around here, welcome to the world of Gielinor!
textByHash.6f4ffb7729b3c984a4fe3459b99f038ea8c85a7e: Well, lucky for you, that is exactly why I am here.
textByHash.30b2a7f577cef328bba59f67288e044c1592360e: Start by opening your quest panel and then selecting the flashing yellow star.
